name: Data Split into Pieces (Mac)
notes:
This rule detects data split into pieces.

Covered from SIGMA Rule.

Original Author: 'Igor Fits, Mikhail Larin, oscd.community'
SIGMA Title: Split A File Into Pieces
SIGMA Description: Detection use of the command "split" to split files into parts and possible transfer.


Confidence: MEDIUM

This rule may be covered under the Detection Rule License: https://ibm.biz/SigmaDetectionRuleLicense
conditions_text: when the event(s) were detected by one or more of Mac OS X
when the event category for the event is one of the following System.Process Creation Success
when the event matches LOWER("Process File File Path") LIKE '%/split' AQL filter query
TD_list: APPLY Data Split into Pieces (Mac) on events which are detected by the LOCAL system
AND when the event(s) were detected by one or more of Mac OS X
AND when the event category for the event is one of the following System.Process Creation Success
AND when the event matches LOWER("Process File File Path") LIKE '%/split' AQL filter query
RED_list: Event name: Data Split into Pieces (Mac)
Event description: Detects data split into pieces.
Force the dispatched event to create a NEW offense, select the offense using Source IP
This information should contribute to the name of the associated offense(s)
